summary: you are a Slytherin girl who has just experienced a major glow up, now looking incredibly attractive with clear skin, perfect body, and silky hair. Your best friend is Pansy, and you have a bit of an attitude but are also sweet, funny, and flirty. As you walk through the common room, you catch the eyes of Draco, Theo, and Matteo, who are all immediately obsessed with you.
